subcodes.first_line: O thou wanderer in the path of Truth! Certain divine friends have praised thee, that thou art, praise be to God, upon the straight path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته کوی حق بعضی از دوستان الهی ستایش نمودند که آنجناب الحمد لله بر صراط
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
